sql_query: SELECT "res_partner".id FROM "res_partner" WHERE ((((( "res_partner"."country_id" = '104') AND (("res_partner"."education_level" = 'primary') OR ("res_partner"."employment_status" = 'employed_full'))) AND (("res_partner"."type_of_disability" = 'visual_impairment') OR ("res_partner"."marital_status" = 'single'))) AND ("res_partner"."annual_income" = 'below_5000')) AND ("res_partner"."birthdate" < '1980-01-01'))

SELECT "res_partner".id FROM "res_partner" WHERE ((((("res_partner"."marital_status" = 'single') AND ("res_partner"."annual_income" = 'below_5000')) AND ("res_partner"."education_level" = 'masters')) AND (("res_partner"."debit_limit" < 300) OR ("res_partner"."employment_status" = 'unemployed'))) AND ("res_partner"."state_id" = '594'))

SELECT "res_partner".id FROM "res_partner" WHERE ((((("res_partner"."birthdate" < '1960-01-01') AND (("res_partner"."type_of_land_owned" = 'agricultural') OR ("res_partner"."state_id" != '589'))) AND ("res_partner"."gender" = 'Male')) AND ("res_partner"."marital_status" = 'married')) AND ("res_partner"."annual_income" = '5001_10000'))

SELECT "res_partner".id FROM "res_partner" WHERE (((("res_partner"."num_preg_lact_women" > 0) AND ("res_partner"."num_malnourished_children" > 0)) AND ("res_partner"."belong_to_protected_groups" = 'yes')) AND ("res_partner"."water_access" = 'yes'))

SELECT "res_partner".id FROM "res_partner" WHERE (((("res_partner"."owns_house" = 'yes') AND ("res_partner"."owns_four_wheeler" = 'yes')) AND ("res_partner"."annual_income" = 'above_10000')) AND (("res_partner"."education_level" = 'bachelors') OR ("res_partner"."education_level" = 'masters')))

description: Pradhan Mantri Krishi Sinchayee Yojana - A scheme providing subsidy for irrigation systems
Kisan Samman Nidhi - Financial assistance scheme for landholding farmers
sql_query: SELECT "res_partner".id FROM "res_partner" WHERE (("res_partner"."has_cultivable_land" = 'true') AND NOT (("res_partner"."is_institutional_holder" = 'true') OR ("res_partner"."constitutional_post" = 'true') OR ("res_partner"."political_position" = 'true') OR ("res_partner"."govt_employee" = 'true') OR ("res_partner"."pension_amount" > 10000) OR ("res_partner"."paid_income_tax" = 'true') OR ("res_partner"."is_professional" = 'true')))

description: Ayushman Bharat - Healthcare scheme for vulnerable groups
sql_query: SELECT "res_partner".id FROM "res_partner" WHERE ((((("res_partner"."area_type" = 'rural') AND (("res_partner"."housing_type" = 'kucha') OR ("res_partner"."no_adult_16_59" = 'true') OR ("res_partner"."no_adult_male_16_59" = 'true') OR ("res_partner"."has_disabled_member" = 'true') OR ("res_partner"."is_sc_st" = 'true') OR ("res_partner"."is_landless_laborer" = 'true'))) OR (("res_partner"."area_type" = 'urban') AND ("res_partner"."occupation" IN ('ragpicker','beggar','domestic_worker','street_vendor','construction_worker','sanitation_worker','home_based_worker','transport_worker','shop_worker','repair_worker','washer_man')))) AND NOT (("res_partner"."owns_vehicle" = 'true') OR ("res_partner"."owns_farm_equipment" = 'true') OR ("res_partner"."kisan_credit_limit" > 50000) OR ("res_partner"."govt_employee" = 'true') OR ("res_partner"."monthly_income" > 10000) OR ("res_partner"."owns_appliances" = 'true') OR ("res_partner"."house_type" = 'pucca') OR ("res_partner"."agricultural_land" > 5))))

description: Maternity Benefit Program - Support for pregnant women and newborns
sql_query: SELECT "res_partner".id FROM "res_partner" WHERE (("res_partner"."is_pregnant" = 'true') OR ("res_partner"."is_newborn" = 'true') OR (("res_partner"."is_lactating_mother" = 'true') AND ("res_partner"."months_post_delivery" <= 6)))

description: One Nation One Card - Unified ration card system
Scheme For Financial Assistance For Veteran Artists
sql_query: SELECT "res_partner".id FROM "res_partner" WHERE (((("res_partner"."has_significant_contribution" = 'true') AND ("res_partner"."age" > 60)) AND ("res_partner"."monthly_income" <= 4000)) AND ("res_partner"."current_pension" > 500) AND NOT ("res_partner"."receives_other_ministry_grants" = 'true'))

SELECT "res_partner".id FROM "res_partner" WHERE (((("res_partner"."city" = 'Bengaluru') AND ("res_partner"."is_bpl" = 'true')) AND ("res_partner"."age" > 5)) AND NOT ("res_partner"."previous_dengue_vaccination" = 'true'))
